description: Tiktok.  Brotherhood’s Arrival – Recreate a trending “entrance” TikTok (slow-motion strut, choreographed walk, or glow-up) in front of what used to be Tabu, which used to be iCandy, featuring at least two team members. EXAMPLE:  https://www.tiktok.com/@its_alyyssaaa/video/7294377688993844526
points_label: Bonus: 1 point for props

description: Tiktok.  The Drag Queen Blessing – With a drag queen, recreate a lip sync TikTok (RuPaul audio encouraged). EXAMPLE:  https://www.tiktok.com/@mldaniel/video/7555705328550038801?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7450947370076407326
Tiktok.  Brotherhood Dance-Off – At least 3 team members recreate a trending TikTok dance outside Bikestop. EXAMPLE:  https://www.tiktok.com/@benchmob/video/7381944530888658218
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if shirtless.  1 additional point if holding a beer.

description: Tiktok. Rom-Com Parody – Recreate a viral rom-com TikTok video near the rainbow crosswalk. EXAMPLE: https://www.tiktok.com/@ethcvora/video/7556072470923447563

Tiktok.  Bathroom Confessional – At what used to be Tabu, which used to be iCandy, go to the bathroom mirror, use a trending rant audio, and lip sync dramatically. EXAMPLE: https://www.tiktok.com/@editszxzll/video/7497788154074762518

Tiktok. Brotherhood Proposal – On Locust Street, one team member mock-proposes to another using a TikTok romantic audio. EXAMPLE:  https://www.tiktok.com/@angelehlers_/video/7514023567252606250?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7450947370076407326
Tiktok. The Rush Challenge – Recreate Troye Sivan’s Rush dance trend in or outside the Bike Stop with at least 3 shirtless participants.

Tiktok. Hack Attack – Try a trending TikTok “life hack” — make it hilariously fail.  EXAMPLE: https://www.tiktok.com/@mr.memes088/video/7236068182950235419?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7450947370076407326

Tiktok.  Action.  Film a fake high-energy drink commercial for “Bottom Fuel,” the drink that “keeps you going when the top can’t.”  Instructions: Use the TikTok “Crazy Frog” or “Sandstorm” audio.  Add fast cuts of chaos, people dancing, someone shaking a can, and energy lines.
points_label: Bonus:  15 points if someone chugs it dramatically, 1 point if someone collapses afterward in slow motion.

description: Tiktok.  Brotherhood Insurance Ad: For When He Doesn’t Text Back. A fake emotional ad for insurance protecting hearts and hangovers.  Instructions: Use “sad violin” or Sarah McLachlan audio, and caption overlays like “Protect what matters… your dignity.”

Tiktok.  Brotherhood Skincare: Nocturnal Emissions Cream.  Film a parody skincare ad with way too much sensual energy, featuring at least two team members rubbing lotion on one another. Instructions: Use soft glow effect, “Glimpse of Us” audio, and close-up shots of men applying lotion in slow-mo. Add text overlays like “clinically proven to ease stress.”
points_label: Bonus: 15 points if someone applies it seductively.

description: Tiktok.  Brotherhood Airlines: Fly Bottom Class. Make a travel ad for a fake budget airline where everyone’s a mess. Use at least two team members.  Instructions: Use green screen background with airplane footage, “Wings” by Little Mix or “Leaving on a Jet Plane” audio, and text-to-speech narration for disclaimers.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if someone acts as a chaotic flight attendant, 15 points if there’s fake turbulence.

description: Tiktok. Recreate a stovetop DJ rave.  EXAMPLE: https://www.tiktok.com/t/ZP8APUV8H/
Tiktok.  Recreate one of these question hand dance videos with the Magic Bomb sound.  EXAMPLE: https://www.tiktok.com/t/ZP8APUwjD/
Video.  Take a video of two men (not on your team) kissing — but recreate a famous movie kiss scene while you direct it.
points_label: Bonus points: 1 point if they’re hot, 1 point if both are straight, 10 points if they actually commit to the scene.

description: Video.  Take a video of someone with an animal tattoo and have them make the noise of that animal while posing with your team (Bonus points:  1 point if it’s a tramp stamp, 1 point if they add a growl or roar).
points_label: Bonus points:  1 point if it’s a tramp stamp, 1 point if they add a growl or roar.

description: Photo.  Locate a lesbian with a black lab and take a photo recreating a Hallmark-style “pet rescue” moment.
Video.  Video of a woman (18+) to flash a team member while yelling “This is for the Brotherhood!” and throw glitter, confetti, or a napkin in the air for dramatic effect.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if she’s wearing Pride merch, 1 point if it happens at a bar

description: Video.  Make a new, attractive, sane, gay friend and record them on a video giving a “testimonial” about why they’d join the Brotherhood
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if they join for a drink, 10 points if they agree to attend the afterparty.

description: Photo. Take a picture of a man and woman kissing, but the couple must be holding hands with one of your team members while doing it
Video.  Film a team member proposing to a stranger using any random object as a ring.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if they say yes

description: Video.  Video of team members making up a cheer for The Brotherhood.
Video.  Video in front of Independence Hall of at least one team member giving a declaration-style speech.
points_label: Bonus:  Automatic 20 point bonus for getting to Independence Hall

description: Video.  Video two guys making out who aren't on your team.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if they’re both straight, 10 points if they shout “For the Brotherhood!” before kissing

description: Video.  Video of a team member carrying another piggyback while shouting “Onward, noble steed!”
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if the rider holds a cocktail,

description: Video.  At Knock, find someone 65+ and record a video of a team member kissing them on the cheek while they bless your “Brotherhood union,”
points_label: Bonus: 10 points if it’s on the lips, 5 points if they offer life advice afterward

description: Video.  Film a team member sipping and dramatically reviewing a bubble tea like it’s a fine wine.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if they spill some dramatically, 1 point if the review includes the phrase “notes of chaos”.

description: Photo. Take a solemn photo in front of the Eliza Sproat Turner guild building, posing as if you’re in a queer period drama.
Photo.  Have at least one team member take a photo in front of the historical marker for Dewey’s Sit-Ins (1965 LGBT demonstrations)
Photo.  Buy a copy of Jason's book, Asher and the Prince, on Amazon and take a screen shot of the purchase confirmation
points_label: Full credit for completion

description: Photo. Have at least one team member take a photo in front of the John E. Fryer, M.D. Historical Marker — “Dr. Anonymous” who helped end APA’s pathologizing of homosexuality.  Where: S 13th St just north of Locust St (Gayborhood)
Photo.  Have at least three team members take a photo in front of Philly AIDS Thrift @ Giovanni’s Room (with state marker) — oldest continuously operating LGBTQ bookstore in the U.S.

Photo.  Have at least two team members take a photo in front of the “Pride & Progress” Mural (Ann Northrup) — block-long LGBTQ history mural on William Way’s west wall. Where: William Way LGBT Community Center, 1315 Spruce St
Photo.  Have at least three team members take a photo in front of the John C. Anderson Apartments (LGBTQ-friendly senior housing) — community landmark for LGBTQ elders
Video.  Take a video at the bar that used to be a horse stall while one teammate dramatically “gallops” across the scene.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if someone neighs, 1 point if a stranger volunteers as a horse.

description: Video.  At least three members sing “This Ain’t Texas” on video on the corner of 12th and Locust
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if more than three members participate, 10 points if you get strangers to join in.

description: Video.  Video of a team member running down Camac Street in your underwear holding a Pride flag or waving an accessory overhead,
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if done during daylight, 1 point if someone applauds.

description: Video.  Video of a team member hugging a stranger for at least five seconds while maintaining eye contact.
points_label: Bonus: 5 points if the stranger says, "I needed that" after.

description: Video.  Record a video of at least two team members singing “Espresso” by Sabrina Carpenter in an Uber, Lyft, or train — choreography encouraged.
points_label: Bonus: 10 points if the driver joins in.

description: Video.  Take a video of at least two members on a rooftop bar while toasting your drinks and reciting a self-written “Brotherhood Oath”
points_label: Bonus:  1 point if someone howls, 1 point if you attract onlookers.

description: Video.  Convince strangers in a bar to pose in a massive group video selfie, chanting “Brotherhood!”
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if at least one drag queen joins, 1 point if the bartender photobombs, 5 points if the bartender is Trevor.

description: Video.  Find a stranger and film them performing a song from Barbie (2023) or The Greatest Showman.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if it’s “I’m Just Ken,” 10 points if they commit like it’s Broadway

description: Video.  Take a video of a team member doing a body shot off another teammate with flair.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if you get applause, 1 point if you do it in public.

description: Photo.  Have a teammate get a piercing or temporary tattoo that represents the Brotherhood.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if it’s visible, 10 points if it says “7429”

description: Photo.  Take a photo of a cute twink (not on your team) at a bar giving his best thirst trap pose.
Photo.  Shave a teammate’s chest into a pattern or word and take a photo.
Video.  Create a fake perfume commercial called Eau de Brotherhood filmed in black and white — slow turns, shirtless posing, and someone whispering “lust… loyalty… Locust” required.
Video.  Shave a teammate’s hole with a steady hand on video
points_label: Bonus: 10 points if someone hums/plays Ave Maria

description: Photo.  Take a towel selfie at Club Philly with at least one other team member.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if at least three are shirtless, 1 point if a stranger joins

description: Photo. Take a picture of a staged three-way kiss (with at least one stranger).
Video.  Record a team member peeing on another (consensually) while singing “Let It Go”.
points_label: Bonus: 10 points if the “target” harmonizes, 1 point if the key change lands.

description: Video.  Perform the chicken dance outside Wishbone using actual music or hummed accompaniment on video.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if it’s synchronized, 1 point if a stranger joins

description: Video.  Film a team member performing a song at Tavern with the pianist — Broadway style.
Photo.  Get a photo of a teammate wearing something leather at Bike Stop while striking a Vogue pose.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if it squeaks, 1 point if it’s borrowed.

description: Video.  Film a fake protest outside a gay bar holding handmade signs that say absurd slogans like “Justice for Bottoms!” or “Equal Rights for Tops!”
points_label: Bonus: 10 points if a stranger honks in support, 1 point if someone gives a stump speech.

description: Photo. The Donut Dilemma – Buy glazed donuts. Do the funniest thing with them involving genitalia.
points_label: Bonus: 5 points per member in the photo, max 35 points

description: Drinks.  At least three team members take a photo drinking Fireball shots at Ubar.
points_label: Bonus: 1 point if the bartender joins

description: Drinks.  At least 3 team members drink Bud Lite together at the Bike Stop
Drinks.  Video of at least two team members chugging a martini at Knock.
Drinks.  Photo of someone your team drinking a cider.
Drinks.  Photo of at least two team members taking a shot on the roof at Little Gay Pub.
Drinks.  Photo of at least three team members taking a shot at Stir.
Drinks.  Photo of at least three team members with drinks at X Bar
Photo.   Photo of a hand drawn love letter to a teammate on a drink napkin, styled like a birthday note from Trump to Epstein
points_label: Bonus: 10 points for finding the unredacted Epstein list.
